tasks.title: Add OAuth foundation
tasks.description: Follow the Pi MCP adapter and official SDK patterns for PKCE, discovery, Dynamic Client Registration, and proxy auth actions.

tasks.title: Implement secure token storage
tasks.description: Store per-server token and client metadata outside mcp.json under /data/canvas-agent/mcp-oauth with strict permissions.

tasks.title: Bind tokens to server config
tasks.description: Persist server identity, config hash, client metadata, scopes, and expiry so changed server configs require re-auth.

tasks.title: Add OAuth callback route
tasks.description: Implement a Next.js callback route on the existing app server and construct redirect URIs from BASE_URL or request origin.

tasks.title: Add proxy auth actions
tasks.description: Expose auth_status, auth_start, auth_finish if needed, and auth_clear through the mcp proxy tool.

tasks.title: Implement token refresh
tasks.description: Refresh tokens before OAuth MCP calls, persist refreshed tokens atomically, and require re-auth when refresh fails.

tasks.title: Apply OAuth security requirements
tasks.description: Keep access tokens out of mcp.json, model content, and logs; validate state; and store short-lived auth state server-side.

tasks.title: Limit Settings impact
tasks.description: Keep raw JSON as source of truth and only add minimal auth status or clear controls if needed.

tasks.title: Add OAuth tests
tasks.description: Cover PKCE state, callback validation, token permissions, refresh success and failure, and config hash mismatch.

tasks.title: Verify Step 4 implementation
tasks.description: Run npm build and browser checks if Settings auth controls are added.
